title: hieracium sagittatum subsp. obliquifolium
intro: Hieracium sagittatum subsp. obliquifolium, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hieracium sagittatum subsp. obliquifolium include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
